query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.
textResponse:
Here are a few of the **top AI-related headlines showing up today, Thursday, April 9, 2026**, based on currently indexed tech/news pages I could verify:

- **Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text** — TechCrunch, posted **13 hours ago**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))
- **AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict** — TechCrunch, posted **14 hours ago**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))
- **Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT** — TechCrunch, posted **16 hours ago**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))
- **OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund** — TechCrunch, posted **3 days ago**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))
- **Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers** — TechCrunch, posted **3 days ago**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))
- **OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek** — TechCrunch, posted **3 days ago**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))
- **AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers** — TechCrunch, published **April 3, 2026**. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/03/...?utm_source=openai))

A few broader AI items I also found, though they are **not from today specifically**, include:
- Google’s recap of major AI updates, including Gemini, AI Mode, Cloud Next, and AI education initiatives. ([blog.google](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-april-2025/?utm_source=openai))
- TechCrunch’s broader AI section, which is currently surfacing today’s AI coverage. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))

If you want, I can do a **cleaner roundup from major outlets only** — for example **Reuters + Bloomberg + TechCrunch + The Verge** — with **1-line summaries and links/sources for each headline**.
